heading: Backups
body:
For [billing](billing-backup-cloud-provider-snapshots),
Atlas charges for storage of data in your replica set, configuration
server, and  network transfer during snapshot restoration. If you
enable [Continuous Cloud Backups](billing-backup-cps-pit), Atlas
charges you according to the continuous cloud backup rates.

To learn more, see [Backups](cluster-config-costs-backup).
